data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon employs a microservices architecture, allowing individual services to operate independently.
data.technical_spec: Decomposition by business capability, RESTful APIs, service mesh utilization.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The architecture supports massive scalability to handle global traffic and operations.
data.technical_spec: AWS Cloud services, auto-scaling groups, load balancing.

data.title: High Availability Setup
data.description: Ensures the system is reliable and available even during failures.

data.title: Continuous Deployment Pipeline
data.description: Automated processes for deploying code changes quickly and safely.
data.technical_spec: CI/CD with Jenkins, automated testing suites, canary deployment strategy.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Utilizes events to decouple software components and improve response times.
